features: HAND CARE Every time you use the Palmolive Aquarium Liquid Soap for hands, help give your hands the care they deserve

NATURAL INGREDIENTS: This wonderfully scented liquid soap refill is made from ingredients 96% natural origin* and with a 97% biodegradable formula. * Water and ingredients of natural origin with limited processing
EFFECTIVE CARE The formula of this refill with liquid soap for hands is vegan, soap-free and dermatologically tested to effectively care for your hands.
This vegan Palmolive hand soap refill without soap is dermatologically tested to care for your hands. Of course, yourself.
LESS PLASTIC WASTE This eco-friendly hand soap refill uses 77% less plastic per ml than a 300ml bottle of hand soap to reduce the amount of plastic waste in the environment.
description: Product Description Start your underwater adventure with the Palmolive Aquarium ECO refill liquid soap for hands. This wonderfully scented liquid hand soap is made from ingredients 96% natural origin* and with a 97% biodegradable formula. In addition, it uses 77% less plastic per ml than a 300ml bottle of Palmolive liquid hand soap to reduce the amount of plastic waste in the environment. This vegan Palmolive hand soap refill without soap is dermatologically tested to care for your hands. Of course, yourself. Ingredients Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulphate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Benzoate, Citric Acid, Glycerin, Perfume, Trisodium Ethylenediamine Disuccinate, Hexyl Cinnamal, Limonene, CI 17200, CI 42090 Safety Warning For external use only See more
